title: paeonia × suffruticosa var. yananensis
intro: Paeonia × suffruticosa var. yananensis is a variety of peony, a type of flowering plant native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Paeonia × suffruticosa var. yananensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Paeonia × suffruticosa var. yananensis can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or dried root, and is also used in modern medicine to create pharmaceutical products.
